CIPHER.1294.cipherString: Good problems and mushrooms of certain kinds have something in common; they grow in clusters.
CIPHER.1294.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by George Pólya encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1294.author: George Pólya

CIPHER.1295.cipherString: Cut my pie into four pieces, I don't think I could eat eight.
CIPHER.1295.question: Yogi Berra has been heard to say the following phrase that has been encoded using the Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1295.author: Yogi Berra

CIPHER.1296.cipherString: Actually, it's nature itself that creates the most beautiful pictures, I'm only choosing the perspective.
CIPHER.1296.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Aristocrat quote by Katja Michael. What does it say?
CIPHER.1296.author: Katja Michael

CIPHER.1297.cipherString: Every sunrise is an invitation for us to arise and brighten someone's day.
CIPHER.1297.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Shree Shambav, encrypted with a Porta using a keyword of DAWNS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1297.author: Shree Shambav

CIPHER.1298.cipherString: An odd outlook on life is the beginning of good comedic writing.
CIPHER.1298.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by Phil Vischer, encoded in a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of FUNNY and polybius key of GOODWILLED. What does it say?
CIPHER.1298.author: Phil Vischer

CIPHER.1299.cipherString: But the sea which no one tends is also a garden
CIPHER.1299.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain—decode this Baconian cipher text by William Carlos Williams. What does it say?
CIPHER.1299.author: William Carlos Williams

CIPHER.1300.cipherString: With science fiction I think we are preparing ourselves for contact with them, whoever they may be.
CIPHER.1300.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by Dwight Schultz, encoded as a Caesar cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1300.author: Dwight Schultz

CIPHER.1301.cipherString: Many eyes go through the meadow, but few see the flowers in it
CIPHER.1301.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Ralph Waldo Emerson encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword length of 5. The 16th through 25th cipher units (44 68 87 45 85 63 66 55 23 96) decode to be GHTHEMEADO. What does it say?
CIPHER.1301.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

CIPHER.1302.cipherString: Never treat your audience as customers, always as partners.
CIPHER.1302.question: Backstage at your local theater, you see the following letters on a sticky note under one of the props. It hides a quote by Jimmy Stewart, encoded as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has PART in it corresponding to the encoded text C A M G N, meaning A = ●×●; C = ●––; G = –●×; M = –×●; N = –×–. You are also told that the cipher contains YOUR. What does it say?
CIPHER.1302.author: Jimmy Stewart

CIPHER.1303.cipherString: The kernel of strategy contains three elements
CIPHER.1303.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Richard Rumelt encoded as a Baconian. You are told that the deciphered text starts with THE K. What does it say?
CIPHER.1303.author: Richard Rumelt

CIPHER.1304.cipherString: Cuando he llegado al supermercado, he visto a otros jóvenes de mi edad ayudando a personas mayores a coger algunos productos.
CIPHER.1304.question: Here is a Spanish-language passage from someone's diary. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decrypt.

CIPHER.1305.cipherString: I'm a werewolf trapped in a human body.
CIPHER.1305.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote by Carrie Vaughn encrypted as an Affine with a=11 and b=3. What does it say?
CIPHER.1305.author: Carrie Vaughn

CIPHER.1306.cipherString: Onion rings in the car cushions do not improve with time.
CIPHER.1306.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Baconian puzzle by Erma Bombeck. What does it say?
CIPHER.1306.author: Erma Bombeck

CIPHER.1307.cipherString: The seed comes when the field is ready, greatness comes when the mind is ready.
CIPHER.1307.question: Swami Samarpanananda offers an observation that has been encoded as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of HYPERNUTRITION. What does it say?
CIPHER.1307.author: Swami Samarpanananda

CIPHER.1308.cipherString: Respect and affection for animals, particularly those who share our homes, recognize no geographic borders.
CIPHER.1308.question: Your microscope slide prep strangely revealed this Aristocrat message by Nick Clooney using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.1308.author: Nick Clooney

CIPHER.1309.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote, encrypted as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 46281324 9755 109 decode to?

CIPHER.1310.cipherString: We cannot see the future, but we can model it today with physics and nanotechnology.
CIPHER.1310.question: You intercepted this transmission from a rogue weather balloon. Decode the Atbash version of Edilson Gomes de Lima's famous words. What does it say?
CIPHER.1310.author: Edilson Gomes de Lima

CIPHER.1311.cipherString: you make me calm in the ocean of chaos.
CIPHER.1311.question: Frozen inside an ice core sample from Antarctica: this Affine message by Avijeet Das. You are told that the cipher text BU decodes to be IN. What does it say?
CIPHER.1311.author: Avijeet Das

CIPHER.1312.cipherString: Her reputation for reading a great deal hung about her like the cloudy envelope of a goddess in an epic.
CIPHER.1312.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Henry James, written as a Caesar Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1312.author: Henry James

CIPHER.1313.cipherString: De niña, ella soñaba con ser artista. Luchó mucho para conseguirlo y finalmente lanzó su primer álbum.
CIPHER.1313.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Xenocrypt-encrypted quote in Spanish using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?

CIPHER.1314.question: An old robot prototype suddenly prints this encoded text. It's a quote, encrypted using a Cryptarithm. What do the values 798625 185 0547 decode to?

CIPHER.1315.cipherString: Education enables humans to achieve their fullest mental and physical potential in both personal and social life.
CIPHER.1315.question: Your school-issued Chromebook's login screen hijacked itself with this Patristocrat quote about schooling from Abhijit Naskar using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains HUMAN corresponding to the ciphertext letters FBOIP. What does it say?
CIPHER.1315.author: Abhijit Naskar

CIPHER.1316.cipherString: Eyes hold the secret of the universe within their depths.
CIPHER.1316.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book on black holes: decode this Complete Columnar version of Anthony T. Hincks. The quote has UNIVERSE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1316.author: Anthony T. Hincks

CIPHER.1317.cipherString: Can't even find the perfect brush to paint what is going through my mind.
CIPHER.1317.question: A quote by Drake has been encoded as a Porta. The 41st through 45th cipher characters (ZHRLU) decode to be GOING. What does it say?
CIPHER.1317.author: Drake

CIPHER.1318.cipherString: Society is itself a kind of organism, an enormously powerful one, but unfortunately not a very wise one.
CIPHER.1318.question: Scratched onto the lens of an abandoned telescope, decode this Aristocrat quote by Isaac Asimov. What does it say?
CIPHER.1318.author: Isaac Asimov

CIPHER.1319.cipherString: You can search the world for happiness but you won't find it until you start being content with what you already have.
CIPHER.1319.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Patristocrat puzzle reveals advice using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains WORLD corresponding with the ciphertext RLOJF on the first line. What does it say?

CIPHER.1320.cipherString: When I call a family meeting I turn off the house wifi and wait for them all to come running.
CIPHER.1320.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote, encoded as a Checkerboard. The deciphered text starts with WHENICALL. What does it say?
CIPHER.1320.author: Unknown

CIPHER.1321.cipherString: The girl slept on, motionless, in that curled-up looseness achieved by some women and all cats.
CIPHER.1321.question: A quote by Raymond Chandler encrypted with the Aristocrat Cipher has been received. What does it say?
CIPHER.1321.author: Raymond Chandler

CIPHER.1322.cipherString: A wide screen just makes a bad film twice as bad.
CIPHER.1322.question: This coded note is discovered inside a sealed envelope labeled “Confidential.” It's a quote by Samuel Goldwyn, encoded using a Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has JUST M in it corresponding to the encoded text U M L W X V R, meaning L = ●–×; M = –×●; R = ×●–; U = ●––; V = ×––; W = ●●●; X = ×–×. What does it say?
CIPHER.1322.author: Samuel Goldwyn

CIPHER.1323.cipherString: I believe in trusting men, not only once but twice - in giving a failure another chance.
CIPHER.1323.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by James Cash Penney, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has ANOTHER somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1323.author: James Cash Penney
